text.tspan: STANDBY
Developer is recharging. Weekly report will resume shortly.
SOURCES SAY
Unnamed keyboard spotted resting peacefully on desk.
DEVELOPING
Local developer reportedly seen outdoors. Authorities investigating.
JUST IN
Coffee reserves holding steady. No commits at this time.
EXCLUSIVE
Anonymous sources confirm: sleep was had this week.
